#  Export a Budget 
##  Background 
Users can export a project's budget to the CSV or PDF file format. By default, files download to the location configured in the user's web browser. Typically, this is the Downloads folder.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions**
    * 'Standard' level permission or higher on the Budget tool.
  * **Additional Information**  
Exports are supported to these file formats:
    * **CSV**. Shows all available rows and columns in the budget view. Filtering and grouping settings are not available in this format.
    * **PDF**. Shows all available rows and columns in the budget view. Filtering and grouping settings are applied in this format.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Project **Budget** tool.
  2. Apply any filtering or grouping options to the budget.
  3. Click **Export** and choose **CSV** or **PDF**.   
This downloads the CSV or PDF file to the location configured in your web browser.


## See Also
  * [Export Budget Changes](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/export-budget-changes)
  * [Budget - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/permissions)
  * [Export a Budget to an Integrated ERP System](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/export-a-budget-to-an-integrated-erp-system)
title: Export a Budget
